transcript: You called me about two weeks ago.
Come on over. Make my day, boy.
How would you like... how would you like a 12-gauge in your head? I'll put another hole in your ass.
Well, come on over. God damn you, I'm getting tired of this bullshit. Come on over, let's see how damn bad you are. Hurry, 'cause I got something to do pretty soon.
